The memo: -
Salary and non-salary of teachers / non-teaching staff in Special Non-Government Schools / Workshops for Persons with Disabilities
Regarding the prescribed procedure to be followed before payment of arrears, Reference No. 1 dated 13th September, 2022
The directions have been issued by the Government Circular No. 2 as prescribed under the letter dated 27th September, 2023 hereunder.
Instructions have been issued to scrutinize and submit proposals as per the scrutiny list done.
Central Government has revised the pay scale for Government employees with effect from 01.01.2016 (Seventh Pay Scale).
Commission) has decided to implement. Accordingly, full-time in government schools with state government employees.

para_trans: The Government has also directed that the additional expenditure arising out of the revised pay structure implemented under this order shall be incurred under the head of accounts for which the salaries and allowances of teaching and non-teaching staff are incurred.

3. Accordingly, the Lions Club Deaf School, Malegaon, Pune received the department from the Commissioner, Divyang Kalyan, Pune. As per the proposal of the 7th Pay Commission Grants to the school employee of Malegaon, District Nashik.
The following funds are being disbursed for grant-in-aid (Programme), 36-Auxiliary Grants (Salary) to Non-Governmental Organisations working for persons with disabilities.
(Amount in thousands)
The Commissioner, Commissionerate of Welfare of Persons with Disabilities, State of Maharashtra, Pune is the controller to control the expenditure of these funds.
remain as an officer. The funds should also be paid to the concerned as per the rules.

6. Staff recruitment rules should be ensured while disbursing funds. Also while distributing funds to the said schools.
The concerned should mark the school staff and check the recruitment advertisements. Recognition / Licensing of the school as well.

9. No expenditure may be made for any purpose other than the purpose for which the fund / grant is sanctioned. As well as other
Funds cannot be diverted to the head of the account.
